{{Quote|Galon Lor, at your service. Aren't these tombs fascinating? We had no idea the Sith were here so long ago.|Galon to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] on the tombs of [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Galon Lor''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] student at the [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Academy]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. During his absence from the academy, he was working on translating the ruins of some of the [[Burial/Legends|tombs]] of Korriban. When [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] arrived to enter the [[Tomb of Ajunta Pall]], Galon Lor was polite when he introduced himself to the former [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]] and explained about the ruins that the Sith first formed. Galon was quite excited to learn the history as an [[Archaeology/Legends|archaeologist]] where he wanted to learn about the existence of [[Ajunta Pall]]. However, he was too nervous to enter the tomb since it had traps and machines that were still active. When [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] left the tomb with the [[Sword of Ajunta Pall]], Lor asked Revan to tell him who gave it to him. After learning that Revan encountered Ajunta Pall as a [[Force ghost/Legends|spirit]], Lor was really interested and went off to inform Master Uthar about the story. It is possible that Galon continued to study and translate the other tombs that he wanted to see while the Sith Academy discovered Revan's treachery over [[Uthar Wynn]]'s death.

==Behind the scenes==
For dark side points, it is possible to kill Galon Lor after the Sith Academy realize the player's treachery.
